final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial sports photography shot of an NBA Finals highlight moment featuring a player wearing jersey number 23.

Style/medium: professional sports photojournalism, 1/2000s high-speed shutter freeze-frame, photorealistic
Composition: low-angle upward shot from floor level, 70-200mm telephoto, shallow depth of field, player dominating foreground with dramatic perspective
Subject: basketball player wearing number 23 jersey, airborne mid-dunk, body arcing through space, defined muscle contours visible under arena lighting, intense focused expression, two defenders attempting to block
Scene/backdrop: packed NBA arena stands with tens of thousands of spectators on their feet cheering, sea of camera flashes creating starfield effect, court floor with visible boundary lines and brand logos
Lighting/mood: professional multi-point high-brightness arena lighting, uniform color temperature, dramatic contrast between lit player and darker crowd
Color palette: vibrant team colors against neutral court tones, warm skin tones, cool shadows in stands, bright white flashes as accent points
Materials/textures: glossy hardwood court surface, fabric texture of jerseys, sweat on skin, individual faces in slightly blurred crowd
Avoid: motion blur, deformed hands or limbs, plastic skin texture, watermark, 8K stuffer words, oversaturated colors
